title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Dick Costolo, ex-CEO of Twitter and managing partner at 01 Advisors, to discuss the anticipated IPOs of SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. The discussion covers IPO timing, the differences between these companies, how capital will be deployed, and whether AI companies represent genuine platforms.
